privacy.title: Privacy note
privacy.message: Your review image includes mood stats and summaries. Once saved to Photos, anyone with access to this device may see it.

permission.title: Photos permission needed
permission.message: Allow MoodMO to save your review image to Photos in system settings.

saveSuccess.title: Saved
saveSuccess.message: Your review image is in Photos.

webUnsupported.title: Not available on web
webUnsupported.message: Save your review image to Photos in the iOS or Android app.

canvas.deltaNoCompare: No comparison to the previous period
canvas.trendCaption: Bar height shows the share resolved each month, oldest to newest
canvas.trendEmpty: No entries in the last 6 months — start with one small feeling.
canvas.weatherEmpty: No weather breakdown for this period
canvas.triggersEmpty: No trigger stats for this period
